items.name: Italijanski zajtrk
items.description: Family-recipe pancakes / or two croissants with chocolate, marmalade, and caramel gravy of your choice. Drink included.

items.name: Tradicionalni zajtrk
items.description: Crispy toast, sausage and cheese, boiled egg, butter and fruit jam. Drink included.

items.name: Domači zajtrk
items.description: Fried eggs / eggs in toast / or an omelet, fresh vegetable salad, sausage. Drink included.

items.name: Vitaminska solata
items.description: Cabbage, carrot, apple.

items.name: Mešana solata
items.description: Fresh tomatoes, cucumbers, sweet peppers, lettuce leaves, carrots, and onions, dressed with lemon juice, aromatic pumpkin seed oil, or olive oil — according to the guest's choice.

items.name: Grška solata
items.description: Fresh tomatoes, cucumbers, sweet peppers, lettuce leaves, carrots, onions, and soft feta cheese, dressed with lemon juice, aromatic pumpkin seed oil, or olive oil — according to the guest's choice.

items.name: Kompleksna solata
items.description: Sliced fresh vegetables with Caesar dressing. Served with juicy chicken fillet / fried fish (R) / pork schnitzel / a boiled egg (J) / or a soft omelette (J) — according to the guest's choice.

items.name: Goveja juha / Beef Soup
items.description: A traditional clear beef broth with noodles.

items.name: Piščančja juha / Chicken Soup
items.description: A traditional clear chicken broth with noodles.

items.name: Tomatna juha / Tomato Soup
items.description: A rich and creamy homemade soup made from ripe tomatoes.

items.name: Gobova juha / Mushroom Soup
items.description: A homemade creamy soup made with fresh mushrooms.

items.name: Sezonska juha / Seasonal Soup
items.description: Rich broth with tender meat and seasonal vegetables.

items.name: Sirna pogača (mala)
items.description: Small cheese pie.

items.name: Sirna pogača (velika)
items.description: Big cheese pie.

items.name: Peljmeni z mesom
items.description: Hearty meat-filled dumplings, served with a dollop of sour cream.

items.name: Vareniki z krompirom
items.description: Soft potato-filled dumplings, drizzled with melted butter.

items.name: Čevapčiči s pomfrijem
items.description: Traditional minced meat rolls, accompanied by ajvar and chopped onions.

items.name: Klobasni MIX
items.description: Assortment of grilled local sausages served with french fries and mustard.

items.name: Domača klobasa
items.description: Traditional Slovenian sausage from Sodražica. Served with french fries / or with a light fresh vegetable salad, dressed with fragrant pumpkin seed oil and lemon juice, ajvar & chopped onions.

items.name: Piščanec s pomfrijem
items.description: Juicy, boneless and skinless fried chicken pieces, served with french fries / or with a light fresh vegetable salad, dressed with fragrant pumpkin seed oil and lemon juice.

items.name: Dunajski zrezek
items.description: Classic Viennese-style breaded and fried schnitzel.

items.name: Riba s solato
items.description: Delicately pan-seared catfish fillet served with a light fresh vegetable salad, dressed with fragrant pumpkin seed oil and lemon juice.

items.name: Palačinke Oladji (5 kos)
items.description: Family-recipe pancakes with chocolate, marmalade or caramel gravy of your choice.
